attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
BATCH_ID,
LINE_ID,
CONTRACT_NUMBER,
START_DATE,
END_DATE,
CDB_DATA_SOURCE,
CDB_ENQUEUE_TIME,
CDB_DEQUEUE_TIME,
CDB_ENQUEUE_SEQ,
QUEUE_ID,
PROCESS_SET_ID,
Q_CREATION_DATE,
Q_UPDATE_DATE,
ACTION_CODE,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
'RI'
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_UO_XXCCA_SER_CNTRCT_ENTL  SUXSCE
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOL
		INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC ON( NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSOL.SS_CODE)
		 WHERE SUXSCE.LINE_ID=SSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT  AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME='UO' )
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY SUXSCE.LINE_ID	ORDER BY SUXSCE.CREATE_DATETIME DESC)  =1

SELECT 
BATCH_ID,
LINE_ID,
CONTRACT_NUMBER,
START_DATE,
END_DATE,
CDB_DATA_SOURCE,
CDB_ENQUEUE_TIME,
CDB_DEQUEUE_TIME,
CDB_ENQUEUE_SEQ,
QUEUE_ID,
PROCESS_SET_ID,
Q_CREATION_DATE,
Q_UPDATE_DATE,
ACTION_CODE,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
'RI'
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_BO_XXCCA_SER_CNTRCT_ENTL  SBXSCE
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOL
		INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC ON( NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSOL.SS_CODE)
		 WHERE SBXSCE.LINE_ID=SSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT  AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME='BO' )
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY SBXSCE.LINE_ID ORDER BY SBXSCE.CREATE_DATETIME DESC)  =1

SELECT
SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
SRV_CONTRACT_NUMBER,
SRV_START_DATE,
SRV_END_DATE,
RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER,
RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM,
RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM,
LINE_ID,
ITEM_CATEGORY_DESCRIPTION,
REVENUE_TYPE_CODE,
USER EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DATETIME	,
SS_CODE  SS_CODE
FROM	(
SELECT	
	CASE
			WHEN	REVENUE_TYPE_CODE='P' THEN
			CASE
			WHEN	ITEM_CATEGORY_DESCRIPTION ='SIS98'
			THEN RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER
			ELSE	CONTRACT_NUMBER
		END
			WHEN	REVENUE_TYPE_CODE='M' THEN
			CASE
			WHEN	ITEM_CATEGORY_DESCRIPTION ='SIS98'
			THEN RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER
			ELSE	CONTRACT_NUMBER
		END
			ELSE	RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER
		END	 	SRV_CONTRACT_NUMBER,
					
	CAST(CASE
			WHEN	REVENUE_TYPE_CODE='P' THEN
			CASE
			WHEN	ITEM_CATEGORY_DESCRIPTION ='SIS98'
			THEN RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM
			ELSE	START_DATE
		END
			WHEN	REVENUE_TYPE_CODE='M' THEN
			CASE
			WHEN	ITEM_CATEGORY_DESCRIPTION ='SIS98'
			THEN RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM
			ELSE	START_DATE
		END
			ELSE	RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM
		END AS TIMESTAMP(0) )		SRV_START_DATE,
			
	CAST( CASE
			WHEN	REVENUE_TYPE_CODE='P' THEN
			CASE
			WHEN	ITEM_CATEGORY_DESCRIPTION  ='SIS98'
			THEN RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM
			ELSE	END_DATE
		END
			WHEN	REVENUE_TYPE_CODE='M' THEN
			CASE
			WHEN	ITEM_CATEGORY_DESCRIPTION ='SIS98'
			THEN RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM
			ELSE	END_DATE
		END
			ELSE	RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM
		END	AS TIMESTAMP(0) ) 	SRV_END_DATE,
			
	NSOLT.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER  				RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER,
	NSOLT.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM 			RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM,
	NSOLT.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM 				RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM,
	WSCI.LINE_ID 									LINE_ID,
	NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
	COALESCE(NSOLT.ITEM_CATEGORY_DESCRIPTION,'=')  					ITEM_CATEGORY_DESCRIPTION,
	NSOLT.REVENUE_TYPE_CODE 						REVENUE_TYPE_CODE,
     WSCI.SS_CODE SS_CODE	
FROM
	$$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_CONTRACTS_INT  WSCI
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOLT
	ON
		( WSCI.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY= NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ) 
WHERE	
		(
	COALESCE(SRV_CONTRACT_NUMBER,'999999')<>COALESCE(RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER,'999999')
	OR	COALESCE(SRV_START_DATE,CAST('1800-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) <> COALESCE(RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM,CAST('1800-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))
	OR	COALESCE(SRV_END_DATE,CAST('1800-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) <>COALESCE(RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM,CAST('1800-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) 
	)
) SRV

SELECT  
SER_OUT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
SER_OUT.LINE_ID,
SER_OUT.CONTRACT_NUMBER,
SER_OUT.START_DATE,
SER_OUT.END_DATE,
SER_OUT.CREATE_DATETIME,
SER_OUT.SS_CODE
FROM 
(
SELECT 
	SSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
	SUXSCE.LINE_ID,
	SUXSCE.CONTRACT_NUMBER,
	SUXSCE.START_DATE,
	SUXSCE.END_DATE,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  CREATE_DATETIME,
	SSOL.SS_CODE
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_UO_XXCCA_SER_CNTRCT_ENTL  SUXSCE
INNER JOIN (
			$$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOL 
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC_SOL
				ON( NSSC_SOL.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSOL.SS_CODE)
			)
ON	( SUXSCE.LINE_ID=SSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT	AND	NSSC_SOL.GLOBAL_NAME='UO' )
UNION ALL
SELECT 
	SSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
	EUXSCE.LINE_ID,
	EUXSCE.CONTRACT_NUMBER,
	EUXSCE.START_DATE,
	EUXSCE.END_DATE,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) CREATE_DATETIME,
        SSOL.SS_CODE
FROM
$$EXCEPDB.EX_UO_XXCCA_SER_CNTRCT_ENTL  EUXSCE
INNER JOIN (
			$$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOL 
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC_SOL
				ON( NSSC_SOL.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSOL.SS_CODE)
			)
ON	( EUXSCE.LINE_ID=SSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT	AND	NSSC_SOL.GLOBAL_NAME='UO' )
) SER_OUT
QUALIFY	ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY SER_OUT.LINE_ID ORDER BY SER_OUT.CREATE_DATETIME DESC	)  =1

SELECT  
SER_OUT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
SER_OUT.LINE_ID,
SER_OUT.CONTRACT_NUMBER,
SER_OUT.START_DATE,
SER_OUT.END_DATE,
SER_OUT.CREATE_DATETIME,
SER_OUT.SS_CODE
FROM 
(
SELECT 
	SSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
	SBXSCE.LINE_ID,
	SBXSCE.CONTRACT_NUMBER,
	SBXSCE.START_DATE,
	SBXSCE.END_DATE,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  CREATE_DATETIME,
	SSOL.SS_CODE
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_BO_XXCCA_SER_CNTRCT_ENTL  SBXSCE
INNER JOIN (
			$$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOL 
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC_SOL
				ON( NSSC_SOL.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSOL.SS_CODE)
			)
ON	( SBXSCE.LINE_ID=SSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT	AND	NSSC_SOL.GLOBAL_NAME='BO' )
UNION ALL
SELECT 
	SSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
	EBXSCE.LINE_ID,
	EBXSCE.CONTRACT_NUMBER,
	EBXSCE.START_DATE,
	EBXSCE.END_DATE,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) CREATE_DATETIME,
        SSOL.SS_CODE
FROM
$$EXCEPDB.EX_BO_XXCCA_SER_CNTRCT_ENTL  EBXSCE
INNER JOIN (
			$$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOL 
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC_SOL
				ON( NSSC_SOL.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSOL.SS_CODE)
			)
ON	( EBXSCE.LINE_ID=SSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT	AND	NSSC_SOL.GLOBAL_NAME='BO' )
) SER_OUT
QUALIFY	ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY SER_OUT.LINE_ID ORDER BY SER_OUT.CREATE_DATETIME DESC	)  =1
